mapper.select: SELECT id, template_code, template_name, scene, system_prompt, user_prompt_template, model, temperature, max_tokens, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM yy_ai_prompt_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yy_ai_prompt_template (template_code, template_name, scene, system_prompt, user_prompt_template, model, temperature, max_tokens, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{scene}, #{systemPrompt}, #{userPromptTemplate}, #{model}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
